headline: Rudy Giuliani CRASHED 🍑🚗💥 in CRITICAL CONDITION 😱🏥‼️
text:
Rudy 'America's Mayor' Giuliani 🗽👨‍💼💪, Trump's OG RIDE-OR-DIE 🐎🔥 and 9/11 HERO 🦸‍♂️🗽 who got KNIGHTED 🛡️👑 by Queen Liz back in '02, is FIGHTING FOR LIFE 😤💥 in STABLE BUT CRITICAL 🏥🚨 condition! Spokesman Ted Goodman 📱💬 dropping the tea ☕: 'Rudy's a FIGHTER 🥊 who SLAYS every challenge like a BOSS 😎 – PRAY UP, fam 🙏🇺🇸 for our Mayor Daddy!' No deets on the illness 🤐, but this 81yo legend 🧓🔥 got BODIED 💀 in a Ford Bronco 🚙💥 rear-end SMASH 🥊 last September in NH 🍁 – fractured vertebrae 🦴🔨, lacerations 🔪😩, arm & leg YEETED 🦵🦿!

Trump 🍊👑 GOAT-posted on Truth Social 📱🐦: 'BEST MAYOR EVER BY FAR 🗽🥇, fought the 2020 STEAL like a CHAMP 🥊🗳️!' Reiterating them DEMON RAT CHEATZ 😈🗳️💸 – 'They FABRICATED 💥📜, DESTROYED our Nation, and NOW LOOK AT RUDY! So SAD! 😢💔' Rudy backed Donnie's 2016 RNC SLAY 🎤🇺🇸, became PERSONAL LAWYER 💼🛡️, then went FULL SEND 🚀 on 2020 'STOLEN' tour 🚌🗳️ accusing Sleepy Joe 😴🕶️ of BALLOT HEIST 🕵️‍♂️💰 – but jury SAID PAY UP 😡⚖️ $148M 🍑💸 to Georgia grannies he DEFAMED 🤬📢!

From NYC post-9/11 BOSS MODE 🗽💥✈️ to prez run FLOP 😂🏃‍♂️, Rudy's been THROWING HAYMAKERS 🥊 for MAGA forever! Car crash deja vu 🚗💥 after late last year wreck – thoracic spine CRACKED 🦴😵, left side MASHED 🥩🚫! Goodman begging PRAYER SQUAD 🙌✨: 'Join us for Rudy's COMEBACK 🦾📈!' Wall Street? Nah, this is HEARTBREAK CITY 😭🏙️ – will Rudy RISE AGAIN like a Phoenix 🔥🕊️ or is this the FINAL BOSS LEVEL? 😱🎮 Trump simps PRAYING HARD 🤲🍊, Biden cucks watching nervously 👀😬 – STAY TUNED, patriots! 🇺🇸🦅💥
